_comment: Buyer-side watchlist — players + filters that drive docs/collect.html. The agent fetches live eBay listings per player + grade combo, flags deals below median, and renders a filter-heavy admin page. Edit freely. Re-run buyer_watchlist_agent.py to refresh.
